metadata.description: Official Bria AI skills — text-to-image generation, image editing, background removal and replacement, object removal, inpainting, outpainting, upscale, restyle, product photography and packshots, batch/bulk generation, VGL structured prompts, and image utilities. Commercially licensed, royalty-free, brand-safe AI image generation and editing API.

dependencies.name: BRIA_API_KEY
dependencies.description: Bria AI API key (get one at https://platform.bria.ai/console/account/api-keys)

plugins.name: bria-ai
plugins.description: AI image generation and editing API via Bria.ai — generate images from text prompts, edit photos with natural language instructions, remove or replace backgrounds for transparent PNGs, create product photography and lifestyle shots, upscale resolution, restyle, and batch-generate visual assets. Commercially safe, royalty-free, brand-safe. 20+ endpoints for e-commerce product photos, hero images, banners, social media visuals, illustrations, icons, ad creatives, and automated image pipelines. Powered by FIBO (text-to-image), FIBO-Edit (instruction-based editing), and RMBG-2.0 (background removal).

dependencies.name: BRIA_API_KEY
dependencies.description: Bria AI API key (get one at https://platform.bria.ai/console/account/api-keys)

plugins.name: vgl
plugins.description: Maximum control over AI image generation - structured VGL JSON that explicitly defines every visual attribute: object placement, lighting direction, camera angle, composition, color scheme, and artistic style for deterministic, reproducible results

plugins.name: image-utils
plugins.description: Classic image manipulation with Python Pillow - resize, crop, composite, watermarks, format conversion, and web optimization for post-processing AI-generated or any images

plugins.name: remove-background
plugins.description: Remove backgrounds from images for transparent PNGs, cutouts, and masks. Segment foreground from background using Bria RMBG 2.0. Dedicated background removal skill — faster and simpler than broader image tools for background removal, transparent PNG creation, product cutouts, headshot background removal, and batch background processing.

dependencies.name: BRIA_API_KEY
dependencies.description: Bria AI API key (get one at https://platform.bria.ai/console/account/api-keys)

plugins.name: video-remove-background
plugins.description: Remove backgrounds from videos for transparent clips, alpha-channel footage, and green-screen-free overlays. Segment moving subjects from background using Bria's video editing pipeline. Dedicated video background removal skill — transparent webm/mkv output, solid-color backgrounds for MP4, local file upload, and batch video processing.

dependencies.name: BRIA_API_KEY
dependencies.description: Bria AI API key (get one at https://platform.bria.ai/console/account/api-keys)
